name: Screamin' Jay Hawkins
description: American singer-songwriter, musician, actor, film producer, and boxer (1929-2000)
abstract: Jalacy J. "Screamin' Jay" Hawkins (July 18, 1929 – February 12, 2000) was an American singer-songwriter, musician, actor, film producer, and boxer.

works_created.t: I Put a Spell On You
I Put a Spell On You

about_quotes.speaker: Tiny Grimes
about_quotes.evidence: You made a lot of records with those guys -- Red Prysock and Screamin' Jay.

about_quotes.speaker: Jerry Gordon
about_quotes.evidence: INTERVIEWER: ...I see Nat Adderley and Pharaoh Sanders and Screaming Jay Hawkins... What — was there one or two things that had to be happening in the music for it to appear on Evidence Records? INTERVIEWEE: It had to be available and I had to like it.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jerry Gordon interviewed by Monk Rowe and Christian Goodwillie, via Zoom, June 30, 2021

about_quotes.speaker: Tiny Grimes
about_quotes.evidence: Screamin' Jay Hawkins had just got out of the airforce, I believe -- or navy or somethin'. And he kept askin' me for a job -- I didn't have no room for another fella

about_quotes.speaker: David Albert Francis
about_quotes.evidence: "I Put A Spell on You with Screaming Jay Hawkins... Then I did, 'Where Are You' with Dinah Washington."
